description: Machine-checkable documentation gap backlog for the Retold ecosystem. Companion to DOCUMENTATION-AUDIT.md. SOLID modules are omitted from `gaps` (tracked only in totals). priority: 1=keystone/shipping-undocumented, 2=shipping-but-empty, 3=pict/utility stub or thin partial, 4=cleanup of existing docs, 5=acceptable-for-scope (optional).
resolvedThisPass: Retold-Modules-Manifest.json: fixed broken Documentation URLs for retold-facto, retold-remote-desktop, retold-remote-ios (were 'fable-retold.io-…').
Retold-Modules-Manifest.json: added missing 'choreographic' entry under Utility.
docs/_sidebar.md: added all 35 previously-absent modules so the central nav surfaces all 115.

tier1AuthoredThisPass.note: Tier-1 keystone docs authored 2026-05-30 and committed to each MODULE's own repo (not the umbrella). Per-module docuserve sites still need building+publishing via the normal pipeline (source/bin/regenerate-module-docs.js). The aggregate docs/retold-catalog.json should be regenerated (npm run build-docs) after those per-module sites build.

modules.detail: Full docs mirroring mysql; verified vs source/ + test/.
Added hosted architecture.md + quickstart.md (site previously had only crud/).
No source/ in this checkout; reconstructed from parime's vendored pattern twin and flagged. VERIFY against source/Orator-Endpoint-Base.js when the source is present.
README + quickstart/architecture/auth-provider; verified vs source/*.cjs; security caveats noted.

tier2AuthoredThisPass.note: Tier-2 docs authored + docuserve sites built 2026-05-30, committed to each module's own repo. Sites built via quack prepare-docs with per-repo org (ultravisor-lab + retold-remote-desktop -> stevenvelozo). Aggregate catalog regenerated.

modules.detail: Relay to remote meadow-endpoints REST; FormSchema + customer scoping. Note: FormSchema default api.qa.headlight.com vs class default 127.0.0.1.
Replaced 5-line README; full api/examples. Code bug FIXED (commit e6474dc): ValidationRegex read this.ValidationRegex instead of this.Options and called RegExp.Match() instead of .test().
MeadowProxy drop-in (port 8390), deterministic synth_* engine, bundled industrial-supply-v1 + customers-demo-v1 specs.

11 docs pages, source-verified. (An earlier 'dead code' flag for source/web_server/routes/Lab-Api-AuthProxy.js was DEBUNKED on review: no such file or AuthTarget/auth-target identifiers exist; routes/ holds 10 live Lab-Api-*.js and the 'Auth' references are live secured-mode presets/services.)
No source/ in this checkout; reconstructed from bin/ + the ultravisor-beacon model with an Unknowns section. Verify against source.
No app source/ in checkout; documented from src-tauri/web-app/scripts/CI. Version mismatch FIXED (commit 0c53700): aligned src-tauri Cargo.toml/tauri.conf.json/Cargo.lock to 1.0.0.

gaps.gap: Keystone loader that dispatches to every connector by Type; site shell exists but zero content docs and no README.
gaps.fix: Author README + architecture + quickstart; document Type-dispatch, graceful driver fallback, and getAllProviderFormSchemas().

gaps.gap: Layer-3 keystone. Excellent README but the hosted docs/ site has only a crud/ subfolder — no top-level architecture.md/quickstart.md like meadow/foxhound.
gaps.fix: Promote README content into docs/architecture.md + docs/quickstart.md so the hosted site reflects its importance.

gaps.gap: 3-line README; zero content docs; but a real v1.0.0 base class other endpoint modules extend, and it is advertised in docs/_sidebar.md and docs/architecture/modules.md.
gaps.fix: Document the route-definition / do* request-handling interface with a minimal extend example.
